subtasks.title: Stand up and walk to the kitchen
subtasks.description: Immediately get up from your chair, stretch your arms, and walk to the kitchen.  No thinking, just movement.  This gets your body moving and clears your head.

subtasks.title: Open textbook to page 3
subtasks.description: Quickly locate the page number 3 in your textbook.  Don’t overthink it, just grab the page.  Visual cue is helpful.

subtasks.title: One sentence note
subtasks.description: Write down *one* key fact or concept from the page 3.  Keep it super short – just a sentence max.  Don’t worry about grammar!

subtasks.title: Quick 5-minute review
subtasks.description: Look at your note and quickly scan it.  Highlight 2-3 key words or phrases.  Don’t analyze, just *see*.

subtasks.title: Quick 5-minute break - stretch!
subtasks.description: Stand up, do a quick stretch – arms, legs, back.  Seriously, just a minute.  This resets your focus.
